next_action: Fix P1: install.ps1 BOM in config.json

advisor_ref.digest_head: No advisor configured in .bee/config.json (no "advisor" key present). Per AO2(b), an unconfigured advisor is not a hard dependency - recording that fact and proceeding. This is a P1 fix from independent review review-cross-platform-install-20260720: install.ps1 writes config.json with -Encoding utf8 on PowerShell 5.1, which emits a UTF-8 BOM that serde_json::from_str (src/config/mod.rs) rejects, breaking config parsing on every Windows launch. Root cause confirmed via direct code inspection. Fix
